manual.note: TEST alert — verifies email + mobile delivery, will be removed

_doc: Price levels watched by the trigger-watch workflow (every 30 min, market hours). Add your own switches to 'manual' as {"ticker": "SNPS", "when": "above"|"below", "level": 415.3, "note": "..."} — set "enabled": false to pause one. 'narrative' is rewritten by each Market narratives run. Open-position stops/targets are watched automatically from trading-data. 'fired' records alerts already sent — delete a key to re-arm that trigger.
